mapper.sql: id, user_id, keyword, search_count, last_searched_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_user_search_history WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user_search_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_user_search_history SET search_count = #{searchCount}, last_searched_at = #{lastSearchedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_user_search_history SET deleted_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT keyword FROM blog_user_search_history WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY SUM(search_count) DESC, MAX(last_searched_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM blog_user_search_history WHERE id < 10000000000
